The '''resonance projector''' was a [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] that fired [[resonance torpedo]]es, plasma [[Warhead/Legends|warheads]] that could destabilize a [[Star/Legends|star's]] core.

==Description==
The resonance projector was a weapon that fired [[resonance torpedo]]es. The torpedoes were activated by passing through the [[resonance energizer]], and were then fired out of the projector. When fired at a [[Star/Legends|star]], a [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]] explosion would be triggered, destroying everything in its path. The resonance projector was the only superweapon capable of destroying an entire [[Star system/Legends|star system]] and killing trillions of sentients at one time.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
{{Noncanonstart|legends=1}}
[[File:Resonance_Torpedo_Launcher.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A Resonance Torpedo Launcher]]
During the development of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]], a weapon known as the Resonance Torpedo Launcher was a proposed weapons system for the [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]].<ref name="DSD">''[[Death Star Designer]]''</ref>
{{Noncanonend}}

The resonance projector was the primary weapon aboard the [[Sun Crusher]]. The projector fired the projectiles that destroyed both the [[Cauldron Nebula/Legends|Cauldron Nebula]], and destabilized the [[Carida/Legends|Carida's]] star, destroying the system.<ref name="EGWT" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
